features: PACK OF 6: Indulge in luxury with each bottle containing royale garden rose, poppy & vanilla hand wash
FRAGRANCE: Unwind with the gentle scent of rose, poppy and a hint of vanilla every time you wash your hands
VEGAN-FRIENDLY: This vegan-friendly formula cares for your skin while being kind to animals and the environment
FEATURES: Each bottle offers a touch of elegance and sophistication to your bathroom or kitchen sink area
BENEFITS: Keep hands soft, clean and beautifully scented all day long with this luxurious hand wash pack
description: Product Description Baylis & Harding Royale garden rose, poppy and vanilla hand Wash. This gorgeous English garden inspired collection is a lovely gift or treat to yourself. This pretty floral fragrance is a lovely mix of classic and modern notes, opening with bergamot and rose leading to a heart of geranium and poppy, completed with notes of white musk, creamy sandalwood and vanilla.This fabulous luxurious hand Wash will look perfect next to any sink. The hand wash leaves skin feeling gently cleansed, whilst the rich fragrance is uplifting and relaxing in equal measure.Founded in 1970 in the heart of England, Baylis & Harding is a family business which has grown from humble beginnings to become an award winning, international success. Beautifully made, beautifully packaged and beautifully fragranced, Baylis & Harding create gifts that are opened with delight and products to make your home feel more wonderful. Ingredients Aqua (Water), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Benzoate, Glycol Distearate, Laureth-4, Glycerin, Parfum (Fragrance), Citric Acid, Tetrasodium Edta. Directions Use as directed Manufacturer Contact Information Nash Road, Redditch, B98 7AS See more
